title: Vedreba
writer: Tengiz Abuladze, Rezo Kveselava, Anzor Salukvadze
actors: Spartak Bagashvili, Rusudan Kiknadze, Ramaz Chkhikvadze
plot: Brave sons of Khevsureti and Kisteti fight against each to protect their homelands. But, they confront faulty domestic traditions to respect enemy's true prowess and find themselves in conflict with own compatriots.
